meaning: adj.亚微细粒的 亚微型的
examples: In this article, deep submicron lithography and nano processing are reviewed.
With deep submicron technology, crosstalk noise becomes more and more serious.
This paper introduces a novel submicron etching technology for emitter window.
Investors fumed when Alphatec announced in February it would buy a controlling stake in Submicron, a wafer-fabrication plant owned by Chaarn.
Each group had its own submicron laboratories, fabs and systems-on-a-chip design libraries.
